en: Hey Jane. Hey Emily. I'm having some trouble sharing my screen in the Zoom meeting.
I can't figure out what's going on. Okay, did you try leaving and then rejoining?
Yeah, still nothing. It just freezes.
Okay, do you want me to share the slides from my computer?
That would be amazing. I'll talk through them.
Okay, just send me the file. I'm doing it right now.
Thanks for saving me. No problem. Happens to everyone.
